metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

boolean.title: Global
boolean.description: "Yes" means all calculation version positions, "No" certain positions based on JSON input.

text.title: PositionsJSON
text.description: Certain positions to process. Will be used, if "Global" is set to "No".

text_1.title: CalculationGUID
text_1.description: Only needs to be given, if "Global" is set to "Yes"

inputs.name: strFetchXML
inputs.value:
<fetch distinct="true">
  <entity name="hso_calculationdetail">
    <attribute name="hso_calculationdetailid" />
    <attribute name="hso_positionelementtype" />
    <attribute name="hso_linenumber" />
<attribute name="hso_name" />
    <filter>
      <condition attribute="hso_calculationid" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['text_1']}" />
    </filter>
    <order attribute="hso_sortinglinenumber" />
    <link-entity name="product" from="productid" to="hso_productid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProduct">
      <attribute name="hso_globalproductid" />
      <attribute name="msdyn_productnumber" />
      <link-entity name="msdyn_globalproduct" from="msdyn_globalproductid" to="hso_globalproductid" link-type="outer" alias="AGlobalProduct">
        <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_globalproductid" to="msdyn_globalproductid" link-type="outer" alias="AGlobalProductTextblock">
          <attribute name="hso_description" />
          <attribute name="hso_language" />
          <attribute name="hso_name" />
          <filter type="or">
            <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number_1']}" />
            <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number']}" />
          </filter>
          <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strFetchXMLLanuguageOrder')} />
        </link-entity>
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_projectproduct" from="hso_projectproductid" to="hso_projectproductid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProjectproduct">
      <attribute name="hso_name" />
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_projectproductid" to="hso_projectproductid" link-type="outer" alias="AProjectproductTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number_1']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number']}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strFetchXMLLanuguageOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_projectexpense" from="hso_projectexpenseid" to="hso_projectexpenseid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProjectexpense">
      <attribute name="hso_name" />
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_projectexpenseid" to="hso_projectexpenseid" link-type="outer" alias="AProjectexpenseTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number_1']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number']}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strFetchXMLLanuguageOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_projecthour" from="hso_projecthourid" to="hso_projecthourid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProjecthour">
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_projecthourid" to="hso_projecthourid" link-type="outer" alias="AProjecthourTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number_1']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number']}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strFetchXMLLanuguageOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_externalservice" from="hso_externalserviceid" to="hso_externalserviceid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasExternalservice">
      <attribute name="hso_currentcost" />
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_externalserviceid" to="hso_externalserviceid" link-type="outer" alias="AExternalserviceTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number_1']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number']}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strFetchXMLLanuguageOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_productionhour" from="hso_productionhourid" to="hso_productionhourid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProductionhour">
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_productionhourid" to="hso_productionhourid" link-type="outer" alias="AProductionhourTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number_1']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number']}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strFetchXMLLanuguageOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
  </entity>
</fetch>

Debug_dynamic_filter_for_positiondetails.description: concat('<filter type="or"><condition attribute="hso_calculationdetailid" operator="eq" value="', join(json(triggerBody()?['text'])?['Ids'],'" /><condition attribute="hso_calculationdetailid" operator="eq" value="') ,'"/></filter>')

inputs.name: strFetchXML
inputs.value:
<fetch distinct="true">
  <entity name="hso_calculationdetail">
    <attribute name="hso_calculationdetailid" />
    <attribute name="hso_positionelementtype" />
    <attribute name="hso_linenumber" />
<attribute name="hso_name" />
@{concat('<filter type="or"><condition attribute="hso_calculationdetailid" operator="eq" value="', join(json(triggerBody()?['text'])?['Ids'],'" /><condition attribute="hso_calculationdetailid" operator="eq" value="') ,'"/></filter>')}
    <order attribute="hso_sortinglinenumber" />
    <link-entity name="product" from="productid" to="hso_productid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProduct">
      <attribute name="hso_globalproductid" />
      <attribute name="msdyn_productnumber" />
      <link-entity name="msdyn_globalproduct" from="msdyn_globalproductid" to="hso_globalproductid" link-type="outer" alias="AGlobalProduct">
        <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_globalproductid" to="msdyn_globalproductid" link-type="outer" alias="AGlobalProductTextblock">
          <attribute name="hso_description" />
          <attribute name="hso_language" />
          <attribute name="hso_name" />
          <filter type="or">
            <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number_1']}" />
            <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number']}" />
          </filter>
          <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strFetchXMLLanuguageOrder')} />
        </link-entity>
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_projectproduct" from="hso_projectproductid" to="hso_projectproductid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProjectproduct">
      <attribute name="hso_name" />
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_projectproductid" to="hso_projectproductid" link-type="outer" alias="AProjectproductTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number_1']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number']}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strFetchXMLLanuguageOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_projectexpense" from="hso_projectexpenseid" to="hso_projectexpenseid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProjectexpense">
      <attribute name="hso_name" />
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_projectexpenseid" to="hso_projectexpenseid" link-type="outer" alias="AProjectexpenseTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number_1']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number']}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strFetchXMLLanuguageOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_projecthour" from="hso_projecthourid" to="hso_projecthourid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProjecthour">
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_projecthourid" to="hso_projecthourid" link-type="outer" alias="AProjecthourTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number_1']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number']}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strFetchXMLLanuguageOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_externalservice" from="hso_externalserviceid" to="hso_externalserviceid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasExternalservice">
      <attribute name="hso_currentcost" />
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_externalserviceid" to="hso_externalserviceid" link-type="outer" alias="AExternalserviceTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number_1']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number']}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strFetchXMLLanuguageOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
    <link-entity name="hso_productionhour" from="hso_productionhourid" to="hso_productionhourid" link-type="outer" alias="AliasProductionhour">
      <link-entity name="hso_textblock" from="hso_productionhourid" to="hso_productionhourid" link-type="outer" alias="AProductionhourTextblock">
        <attribute name="hso_language" />
        <attribute name="hso_name" />
        <attribute name="hso_description" />
        <filter type="or">
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number_1']}" />
          <condition attribute="hso_language" operator="eq" value="@{triggerBody()['number']}" />
        </filter>
        <order attribute="hso_language" @{variables('strFetchXMLLanuguageOrder')} />
      </link-entity>
    </link-entity>
  </entity>
</fetch>

inputs.name: strResponse
inputs.value: An unexpected error occured. Please check Flow Run History for details.
